name: Apogee Optocom Co., Ltd.
summary: Apogee Optocom Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells communication components. The company offers active and passive optical filters. It also provides 3D sensors; data center products; OEM and ODM coating services; and coating, polish cut, and check test equipment. Apogee Optocom Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.
